title: Energy Demand Optimizer
summary: Forecast energy demand and surface optimization actions for operations and procurement teams.
knowledge_base: Energy Demand Optimizer is positioned as a Energy Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Forecast energy demand and surface optimization actions for operations and procurement teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on energy, forecast, optimization.
